headline: Data Scientist | Software Engineer | Data Engineer
about: I am a data scientist with a developer's mindset, focused on building systems that connect analytics, machine learning, and product delivery.
My experience spans cloud-native integrations, backend services, large-scale analytics, and applied machine learning projects.

highlights: Built integration-focused software features and delivery workflows.
Worked on cloud-native services, APIs, and production support.
Contributed to reliable engineering practices around shipping and maintenance.
Supported enterprise integration and data-oriented engineering work.
Worked across implementation, debugging, and release delivery.
Collaborated with teams on service reliability and change requests.
Supported courses and labs in data, networking, and IT topics.
Helped students with debugging, concepts, and practical assignments.

education.degree: Master of Science in Data Science
